data.name: Error_file_not_found
data.value: The specified file was not found.

data.name: Error_no_chunks_found
data.value: No {0} chunks were found in the input file.

data.name: Error_invalid_AirSlide_parent
data.value: The specified AirSlide parent is invalid.

data.name: Error_invalid_Air_parent
data.value: The specified Air parent is invalid.

data.name: Error_soflanArea_has_no_tail
data.value: The SoflanArea is missing a tail.

data.name: Error_hold_has_no_tail
data.value: The Hold is missing a tail.

data.name: Error_BPM_change_event_not_found_at_0
data.value: No BPM change event was found at tick 0.

data.name: Diag_time_Signature_event_not_found_at_0
data.value: No Time Signature event was found at bar 0. Defaulting to a 4/4 time signature.

data.name: Diag_main_timeline_not_found
data.value: There was no events found on main TIL {0}.

data.name: Diag_note_overlapped_in_different_TIL
data.value: The note overlaps with note in other TILs. This may cause problems in the scroll speed of this note.

data.name: Error_air_parent_null
data.value: Parent of Air cannot be null.

data.name: Error_air_slide_parent_null
data.value: Parent of AirSlide cannot be null.

data.name: Diag_set_length_smaller_than_unit
data.value: The length of this note is {0}. This might be due to nodes in the original note having spacing less than {1}.

data.name: Diag_concurrent_ex_effects
data.value: Different EX effects coexist at the same tick: {0}. The game may only display one of these.

data.name: Overlapping_Air_Parent_Slide
data.value: Due to multiple overlapping Slide nodes existing simultaneously, it is unknown to determine from which Slide node the Air should start.

data.name: Diag_Unrecognized_meta
data.value: Unknown property mark {0} at file position 0x{1:X2}, data: {2}.

data.name: Error_Unrecognized_event
data.value: Unknown event mark {0} at file position0x{1:X2}.

data.name: Error_Invalid_Header
data.value: The header {0} in the chart file does not match {1}.

data.name: Error_Unrecognized_note_type
data.value: Unknown note type {0} at file position 0x{1:X2}.

data.name: Error_Size_Incompatible
data.value: Expected to read {0} bytes for {1} but only got {2}.

data.name: Error_preview_stop_greater_than_start
data.value: The preview stop time must be greater than the start time.

data.name: Diag_chart_modified
data.value: The chart has been modified since it was last opened. However, the old chart property will still be used.

data.name: Diag_no_sortname_provided
data.value: No SortName was provided. A new SortName has been generated from the Title.

data.name: Diag_meta_override_arument_count_mismatch
data.value: '#override {0}' requires at one argument or two arguments.

data.name: Diag_string_id_not_found
data.value: The specified StringID (id or str) {0} could not be found in '{1}'. Please check your input or run "Recollect A000" to refresh the database. If you want to use your custom StringID, please provide both (i.e. "#meta ... [ID] [String]").

data.name: Diag_first_argument_must_int
data.value: First argument must be a valid integer.

data.name: Diag_pv_laterthan_120
data.value: The preview start time is set later than 120 seconds. This may cause the game to freeze when selecting the song.
